top_comment.text: I'm not sure the motivating story - internet debate - is the best example for epistemology. Maybe you should rule out the interpretation of a fight with words where the truth is secondary or only superficially the point. Or maybe you want to include that reading, but then you may want to spend a few words differentiating these cases.
